name: Human UI Layer
purpose: public landing, engineering workbench, and in-browser playground

name: Machine Corpus Layer
purpose: AI-readable documentation, specs, schemas, examples, genealogy

name: Agent Tool Layer
purpose: bounded machine-callable tools running the real toolchain

text: EML is a deterministic semantic-overlay layer: it compresses high-frequency program intent into symbols and transpiles, rule-based and reversibly, to Python. No LLM in the core chain.

name: determinism
text: Same input yields the same tokens, AST, Python, and trace (modulo trace timestamps).

name: round-trip
text: Python(subset) -> EML -> Python is a byte-identical fixpoint; the reverse path fails loudly.

name: execution-truth
text: The interpreter's stdout is test-gated to equal CPython's; eml trace --run bakes in an eml:equiv check.
Transpile EML->Python but are not part of the round-trip invariant.

python:
N = 100
r = sum(i**2 for i in range(1, N+1))
print(r)
